# Rasteret

> Index-first access to cloud-native GeoTIFF collections for ML and analysis. A growing catalog of pre-registered datasets, multi-cloud (S3/Azure/GCS), up to 20x faster reads.

Index-first access to cloud-native GeoTIFF collections for ML and analysis. A growing catalog of pre-registered datasets, multi-cloud (S3/Azure/GCS), up to 20x faster reads.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/getting-started/index.md)

## Tutorials

- [Quickstart](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/01_quickstart/index.md)
- [TorchGeo Integration](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/02_torchgeo_09_accelerator/index.md)
- [Parquet Filtering](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/03_parquet_first_filtering/index.md)
- [Configuring Custom Collections](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/04_custom_cloud_and_bands/index.md)
- [TorchGeo Benchmark](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/05_torchgeo_comparison/index.md)
- [Building from Parquet](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/06_non_stac_cog_collections/index.md)

- [Custom Cloud Provider](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/custom-cloud-provider/index.md)
- [Dataset Catalog](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/dataset-catalog/index.md)
- [Enriched Parquet Workflows](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/enriched-parquet-workflows/index.md)

- [Collection](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/core/collection/index.md)
- [Execution](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/core/execution/index.md)

- [Utilities](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/core/utils/index.md)
- [COG Reader](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/fetch/cog/index.md)
- [Header Parser](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/fetch/header_parser/index.md)
- [rasteret.ingest](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/index.md)
- [COG Enrichment](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/enrich/index.md)
- [Normalize](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/normalize/index.md)
- [Record Table](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/parquet_record_table/index.md)
- [STAC Indexer](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/stac_indexer/index.md)
